post.description: Downloads the export associated with the specified token.

Generates an export token that can be used to download assets data in XLSX format. You can use the [Download Export](ref:io-asm-exports-download) endpoint to download the export data with the token. Please note that the maximum number of assets that can be exported in this format is 100,000. HTML data will also be omitted due to size limitations. For larger exports, please consider exporting in a different format.
Generates an export token that can be used to download assets data in CSV format. You can use the [Download Export](ref:io-asm-exports-download) endpoint to download the export data with the token.
Generates an export token that can be used to download assets data in JSON format. You can use the [Download Export](ref:io-asm-exports-download) endpoint to download the export data with the token.

post.summary: Export source list in CSV format
post.description: Generates an export token that can be used to download the source list in CSV format. You can use the [Download Export](ref:io-asm-exports-download) endpoint to download the export data with the token.

post.summary: Export source list in XLSX format
post.description: Generates an export token that can be used to download assets data in XLSX format. You can use the [Download Export](ref:io-asm-exports-download) endpoint to download the export data with the token. Please note that the maximum number of sources that can be exported in this format is 100,000.

get.description: Retrieve a list of sources in your inventory.

parameters.name: sortby
parameters.description:
Sort by criteria:
  * abc - Alphabetical sort based on source keyword, ascending order
  * count - Sort based on fetched result count, descending order
  * count_asc - Sort based on fetched result count, ascending order
  * txt_count - Sort based on TXT records fetched count, descending order
  * txt_count_asc - Sort based on TXT records fetched count, ascending order
  * recency - Default sorting, descending order

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Searching within source keywords

200.description: Returned if Tenable Attack Surface Management successfully returned the list of sources.

searches.description: Result source data in an array

items.description: Singular source data in a JSON object

keyword.description: The keyword that was added when the source was created

search_type.description:
The type of the sources:
  * keyword - Keyword source type
  * domain - Domain source type
  * ip - IP address source type
  * iprange - IP address range source type
  * moved - Source type for assets that were moved from other inventories
  * literal - Literal source type
  * cloudflare - Cloudflare source type
  * aws - AWS source type
  * gcp - Google Cloud Platform
  * azure - Microsoft Azure

results_count.description: The number of results in the source

results_fetched.description: The number of fetched results in the source

company_id.description: The ID of the sources' inventory

created_at.description: Timestamp of the creation of the source

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last update that happended on the source

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the source was deleted

screenshot.description: URL that points to the screenshot of the source

limited_result.description: A flag that indicates if the source has reached the limits defined by the license.

txt_records_fetched.description: The number of TXT records fetched for the source

is_elastic.description: Indicates whether or not the source is an elastic source or not

total.description: Count of the total number of sources in your inventory

parameters.name: as_subdomain
parameters.description: If keyword is example.example.com and as_subdomain is true, we'll add everything under example.example.com including itself. Otherwise we'll add everything under example.com including itself.

parameters.name: dont_discover
parameters.description: If keyword is example.com and dont_discover is true, we won't perform subdomain discovery which means that only assets with hostname 'example.com' will be added.

parameters.name: is_elastic
parameters.description: Set to true if assets in this source should be resolved to their current IP address each time when extracting data

Creates a new Cloudflare key in the business of the current user.

id.description: The ID of the newly created Cloudflare key.

404.description: Returned if no name was provided for the Cloudflare key.

500.description: Returned if an internal error occurred in Tenable Attack Surface Management.

Unauthorized.description: Returned if you do not have permissions to use this endpoint.

NotFound.description: Returned if Tenable Attack Surface Management could not find the specified child account.

InternalError.description: Returned if an internal error occurred in Tenable Attack Surface Management

BadRequest.description: Returned if your request specified invalid parameters or if your request was improperly formatted.

schema.description: Applied filters, suggestions do not support complex queries

app_updates.description: Date when data with the given namespace (<namespace>.<key>, e.g. own_body.html) was last queued for update.

bd.addedtoportfolio.description: Timestamp of date when the Asset was added to the current inventory.

bd.hostname.description: It has been deprecated. Please use bd.record_value instead of it.

bd.original_hostname.description: Hostname of the Asset in case of CNAME records.

bd.subdomain.description: Whether the hostname of the Asset is a subdomain or not.

bd.tags.description: IDs of simple Tags associated with the Asset. Corresponds with the Tag column on the UI.

bd.tag_<tag_id>_<type>.description: User-entered value of a specific Custom Column.

bd.string_custom_columns.description: List of all string custom columns associated with the Asset.

bd.custom_columns.description: List of all number custom columns associated with the Asset.

bd.tenable_nessus_findings.description: List of matching Host Asset findings for the Asset.

bd.tenable_was_findings.description: List of matching Web App Asset findings for the Asset.

bd.sources.description: The list of source ids that the asset belongs to.

bd.severity_ranking.description: The severity ranking of the asset.

bd.last_metadata_change.description: The last time the asset metadata changed.

domaininfo.administrativecontact_email.description: Administrative contact email of the Asset

domaininfo.administrativecontact_name.description: Administrative contact name of the Asset

domaininfo.administrativecontact_organiz.description: Administrative contact organization of the Asset

domaininfo.billingcontact_email.description: Billing contact email of the Asset

domaininfo.registrant_country.description: Registrant country / region of the Asset

domaininfo.registrant_postalcode.description: Registrant postal code of the Asset

domaininfo.technicalcontact_email.description: Technical contact email of the Asset

domaininfo.zonecontact_email.description: Zone contact email of the Asset

domaininfo.administrativecontact_telepho.description: Administrative contact telephone of the Asset

domaininfo.technicalcontact_organization.description: Technical contact organization of the Asset

domaininfo.technicalcontact_name.description: Technical contact name of the Asset

hidden.description: Whether the Asset has been archived or not.

id.description: The unique id of the Asset.

ipgeo.asn.description: The Autonomous System Organization of the Asset.

ipgeo.asn_number.description: The Autonomous System Number of the Asset.

ipgeo.cloudhosted.description: Whether the Asset is cloud-hosted or not.

ipgeo.insideeu.description: Whether the Asset is located in the EU or not.

ipgeo.registered_country.description: Country / region where the Asset was registered.

own_body.contentlength.description: Length of the content served by the Asset in bytes.

own_body.html.description: Raw response body returned by the Asset.

own_body.canonical.description: Canonical URL found in the HTML body returned by the Asset.

own_header.content-type.description: The type of content served by the Asset.

own_header.content-language.description: The language of content served by the Asset.

own_header.names.description: Names of HTTP headers set by the Asset.

own_header.secnames.description: Names of HTTP security headers set by the Asset.

own_header.responsecode.description: HTTP status code returned by the Asset.

own_header.server.description: Web server running on the Asset based on HTTP response headers.

own_header.setsCookies.description: Whether the Asset sets cookies or not.

own_header.vary.description: The value of HTTP header Vary set by the Asset.

own_header.values.description: HTTP header values returned by the Asset.

own_header.secvalues.description: HTTP security header values returned by the Asset.

ports.banners.description: Banners returned by services running on the Asset.

items.example:
HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request Content-Type: text/html; charset=us-ascii Date: Sat, 08 Feb 2020 17:21:32 GMT Connection: close Content-Length: 311 Bad Request

Bad Request

HTTP Error 400. The request is badly formed.

ports.verified_ports.description: Ports that are open AND have non-empty banners.

ports.lastseen.description: Date of last scan for each individual port open on the Asset.

ports.cpes.description: Services running on the Asset in CPE format.

ports.cves.description: IDs of CVEs that apply to the Asset.

ports.cvss3_scores.description: Unique CVSS3 scores that apply to the Asset.

ports.cvss3_vectors.description: Unique CVSS3 vector strings that apply to the Asset.

rbls.rbls.description: Realtime Blackhole Lists that contain the Asset.

rbls.sampledate.description: Last check of each RBL the Asset appears on.

screenshot.finalhtml.description: Raw final response body returned by the Asset.

screenshot.finalurl.description: The final URL the Asset redirects to.

screenshot.final_response_code.description: The response code returned from the final URL the Asset redirects to.

screenshot.screenshot.description: URL of a screenshot taken of the Asset.

screenshot.redirect_chain.description: The chain of HTTP or client-side redirects that navigated the system to screenshot.finalurl

ssl.available_suites.description: Cypher suites available on the Asset.

ssl.ev_cert.description: True, if the SSL / TLS certificate of the Asset is an EV cert.

FilterItem.description: One expression, it's either an object with only 'and' or 'or' properties, or a leaf node with 'column', 'type', 'value' and 'endLabel' properties.

column.description: The property to filter on. You can use the [List Asset Properties](ref:getavailablecolumns) endpoint to get a list of possible values.

type.description: The type of filter to apply. Refer to [Robust Filtering](https://docs.tenable.com/attack-surface-management/Content/Topics/Inventory/AssetFilters.htm#Robust_Filtering) for a list of possible filter types.

value.description: The value to filter on. For date-time values, please use the ISO format. For example: "2024-10-21T10:00:00.000Z".

Filters.description: Filters to be applied on assets, consists of FilterItem objects.

AssetResolution.description: Host or Web App asset resolution status.

TioAssetMeta.description: Metadata about a matching Host or Web App asset.
